description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages, build and deploy. In the build stage add a benchmarks job (image registry.gitlab.com/datadrivendiscovery/images/testing-lite:$IMAGE_TAG, docker:19-dind service, variables DOCKER_HOST and GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY, before_script prints Docker info, script runs ./run_benchmarks.sh), a run_check job (parallel matrix IMAGE_TAG, script: python3 setup.py sdist, pip3 install $(ls dist/*)[tests], rm -rf d3m d3m.*, python3 -m d3m --version), a style_check job (same image, script: pycodestyle d3m), a test_datasets job (before_script prints Docker info and shows git info, script builds sdist, installs tests, removes d3m, then runs dataset and problem describe commands on /data/datasets and /data/datasets_public, uses docker service, tag datasets), a tests job (setup, install, clean, pip freeze, pip check, python3 ./run_tests.py), a tests_individually job (same setup then loops over tests/*.py executing each), a tests_oldest_dependencies job (setup, install, then runs ./oldest_dependencies.py pipelines to upgrade numpy and other deps, pip freeze, pip check, run_tests.py), a tests_windows job (Windows runner with choco installs for Python $PYTHON_VERSION and pip $GET_PIP, refreshenv, adjust PATH, then py setup.py sdist, pip install $(ls dist/*)[tests], clean, pip freeze, pip check, py run_tests.py, matrix over PYTHON_VERSION and GET_PIP), a tests_with_optimize job (same as tests but sets PYTHONOPTIMIZE=true), and a type_check job (install .[tests] and typing-requirements.txt, run mypy d3m). In the deploy stage add a pages job (image testing-lite:ubuntu-bionic-python36, only on devel or tags, script builds site if tag or devel, publishes public/ as artifact), a trigger_docs_generation job (image testing-docker:ubuntu-bionic, only devel or tags, curls GitLab API to trigger docs pipeline), a trigger_images_rebuild_devel job (image testing-docker:ubuntu-bionic, only devel, curls API to trigger image rebuild with core and core-lite variables), and a trigger_images_rebuild_master job (image testing-docker:ubuntu-bionic, only master, similar curl to trigger image rebuild).
